title: alnus viridis f. mollis
intro: Alnus viridis f. mollis, also known as the green alder, is a type of deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the alder family. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Alnus viridis f. mollis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
